mapper.select: SELECT su.*, m.name AS major FROM student_users su LEFT JOIN major m ON su.major_id = m.id WHERE su.student_user_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: insert into student_users (username, student_user_id, name, create_time, update_time, major_id, grade, class_id, password, phone, school, department, email) values (#{username}, #{studentId}, #{name}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{majorId}, #{grade}, #{classId}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{school}, #{department}, #{email})
mapper.select: SELECT su.*, m.name AS major FROM student_users su LEFT JOIN major m ON su.major_id = m.id WHERE su.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update student_users
password = #{password},
name = #{name},
gender = #{gender},
student_user_id = #{studentId},
grade = #{grade},
class_id = #{classId},
major_id = #{majorId},
status = #{status},
phone = #{phone},
school = #{school},
department = #{department},
email = #{email},
classes = #{classes},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT su.*, m.name AS major FROM student_users su LEFT JOIN major m ON su.major_id = m.id

SELECT * FROM student_users WHERE id IN
#{id}

SELECT * FROM student_users WHERE student_user_id IN
#{studentUserId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO student_users (username, student_user_id, name, gender, password, create_time, update_time, major_id, grade, class_id, phone, school, department, email) VALUES
(#{studentUser.username}, #{studentUser.studentId}, #{studentUser.name}, #{studentUser.gender}, #{studentUser.password}, #{studentUser.createTime}, #{studentUser.updateTime}, #{studentUser.majorId}, #{studentUser.grade}, #{studentUser.classId}, #{studentUser.phone}, #{studentUser.school}, #{studentUser.department}, #{studentUser.email})
mapper.update:
UPDATE group_table SET leader_student_id = NULL WHERE leader_student_id IN
#{id}
UPDATE group_table SET leader_student_id = NULL, leader_teacher_id = NULL WHERE id = #{groupId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM student_users WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_users WHERE class_id = #{classId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_users WHERE major_id = #{majorId}
SELECT * FROM student_users ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT DISTINCT grade FROM student_users WHERE grade IS NOT NULL ORDER BY grade DESC

SELECT su.id, su.student_user_id AS studentUserId, su.name, su.gender, su.grade, su.major_id AS majorId, su.class_id AS classId, c.name AS className, m.name AS majorName, su.status, sis.status AS internshipStatus, cu.company_name AS companyName FROM student_users su LEFT JOIN class c ON su.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON su.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN student_internship_status sis ON su.id = sis.student_id LEFT JOIN company_users cu ON sis.company_id = cu.id WHERE su.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY su.student_user_id ASC
